_meta.description: Ticket 120 regression: direct page.goto to FrmDetalleClie.aspx crashed IIS. Root cause was NAV (invalid direct navigation), secondary effect was ENV (app pool crash). Old triage incorrectly classified as ENV/PAGE_LOAD_FAILED primary.
_meta.scenario: 8 escenarios, todos fallaron en beforeEach por direct goto a FrmDetalleClie.aspx

assertions: category must be NAV (not ENV) because login succeeded before the failure
causal chain evidence must be documented
rerun_recommended must be false (structural fix required, not flake)
human_action_required must reference human_path or nav strategy
